name: python3-djangorestframework-spectacular
title: python3-djangorestframework-spectacular
summary: OpenAPI 3 schema generation for Django REST framework (Python3 version)
description:
OpenAPI 3 schema generation for Django REST framework (Python3 version)
Sane and flexible OpenAPI 3 schema generation for Django REST framework. The
code is a heavily modified fork of the DRF OpenAPI generator, which is/was
lacking all of the below listed features:
.
* Serializers modelled as components (arbitrary nesting and recursion
supported)
* Authentication support (DRF natives included, easily extendable)
* Custom serializer class support
* Tags extraction
* Description extraction from docstrings
* Sane fallbacks where no Serializer is available
* Sane operation_id naming (based on path)
* Easy to use hooks for extending the AutoSchema class
* Optional schema serving with SpectacularAPIView
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-djangorestframework-spectacular because OpenAPI 3 schema generation for Django REST framework (Python3 version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-djangorestframework-spectacular as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-djangorestframework-spectacular with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-djangorestframework-spectacular --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
